At Joko, we help consumers shop smarter. Our mission is to revolutionize shopping, empowering people to find what they need, make informed decisions, and save money.

Founded in Paris, Joko is a tech company and certified B Corp with over 105 talents across Paris, Barcelona, and New York (and beyond). More than 6 million users already save money every day at 10,000+ merchants with Joko.

From cashback and automatic coupons to price alerts and carbon tracking, we keep expanding our products to make shopping smarter. We’re now building an AI-powered shopping assistant to help users find the best products by price, quality, and environmental impact.

Having reached profitability in our core market, we’re now scaling globally, with a strong focus on the US.

It’s still day 1, come build the future of shopping with us!

This position is remote-friendly.

🧚🏻 Our Data team

The Data team at Joko is turning mountains of data into actionable insights for all the teams! The Data team is part of our Operations department led by our COO, and our mission is to empower the company to make informed decisions.

More Specifically, The Team's Responsibilities Are

  • State-of-the-art analytics & data science: We want to be at the forefront of analytics and data science by building top-notch analyses and tools. Our goal is to allow teams to leverage powerful insights from advanced reporting and predictive models.
  • AI-driven autonomy for stakeholders: We are doubling down on the combination of AI and data to unlock a new level of autonomy for our stakeholders, seamlessly bridging data insights with the AI tools we use, built on secure and trustworthy foundations.
  • Spread the data culture: At Joko, we have a strong engineering and tech culture across all teams. We work hand-in-hand with our stakeholders, providing support and training on data tools, and building close relationships to ensure our solutions align perfectly with their operational needs and evolve with them over time.

🎯 What you will do

As a Data Analyst, you will have a cross-functional role and collaborate closely with teams to understand our data and develop insights.

  • Advanced analytics & data science: You will explore and analyze data to uncover trends, patterns, and potential issues that will support decision-making processes across all teams. You will also contribute to data science initiatives by building predictive models and applying statistics to generate deeper insights and drive measurable business impact.
  • Reporting and Data Visualization: You will design and create dashboards and data visualizations that empower stakeholders to explore data autonomously. Leveraging AI tools to move faster, your focus will be on what matters most: defining the right metrics, surfacing meaningful insights, and ensuring data is understood and acted upon across the company.
  • AI and data integration: You will actively contribute to bridging our data with the AI tools we use, ensuring insights are integrated and maintained over time.
  • Stakeholder collaboration: You will work hand-in-hand with stakeholders to understand their needs, collect their feedback, and evangelize data usage to help them make smarter choices and become more autonomous over time.
  • Continuous Learning and Improvement: As "never stop learning" is one of our values, you will grow along the way and keep up with the latest analytical methods, AI developments, and tools in our data stack.

👀 Who we're looking for

  • Experience: You have 2+ years of professional experience in data analysis (relevant internships can count). We hire across different seniority levels, so we encourage you to apply even if you are more experienced.
  • Interest in AI: You are genuinely curious about AI and its applications, and eager to leverage it in your day-to-day work to move faster and create more impact.
  • Mindset: You have an entrepreneurial mindset, you like challenges, you welcome feedback and you are willing to get better every day to reach excellence.
  • Problem-solving & Analytical skills: You love solving complex problems and analyzing data.
  • Coding knowledge: Mastering SQL and Python is not mandatory, as you can still learn when joining, but it's a plus.
  • Business acumen: You can understand the needs of your business stakeholders and get the big picture of how the business is running.
  • Communication: You know how to present your conclusions clearly and concisely (written and oral).
  • Education: You have graduated from a top-tier business or engineering school.
  • Languages: You are fluent in English, both written and spoken.

💎 Our perks

(Some of the benefits listed below are available to full-time positions only)

At Joko, we believe that flexibility and trust are essential. Our work environment reflects this through:

  • Flexible remote : If you live in Paris, you can choose to work from our office or from home with no constraints. If you live elsewhere, we can provide access to a coworking space and a coworking budget.
  • Work from anywhere : Want to spend a month in Italy while working? You can work from most countries in the world for up to 3 months per year.

On Top Of That, We Offer Plenty Of Perks

  • 💸 Top-market compensation
  • 📈 Equity for everyone with the chance to own a piece of what you build
  • 🤖 Half-day each week dedicated to leveling up with AI by exploring new tools, iterating hard, and sharpening your skills
  • 🌴 Yearly offsite in amazing locations and budget for team-building events & monthly in-person gatherings
  • 💪 Contribution to your ClassPass subscription
  • 🍼 8-week leave paid 100% for the second parent
  • …and much more, check the full list here!

🤝 Our hiring process

  • Intro call: Quick screening with the Hiring Manager or the Talent team.
  • Step 1 – Team interview (45 min): Conversation with two Joko team members (could include the Hiring Manager, people from the team you’d join, or colleagues from other teams).
  • Step 2 – Role-specific assessments
    • For non-engineering roles: A take-home case study followed by a 45-min interview. We assess both your output and how you think in real time. The exercise will be relevant to your role (e.g. analysis, strategy, or process design).
    • For engineering roles: A 90-min live technical interview on CoderPad covering code understanding, review, system design, and product thinking (with AI serving as a collaboration tool).
  • Step 3 – Leadership interview (45 min): Conversation with a SteerCo member and a Founder.
  • References: Up to 3 calls with former colleagues or managers.
☕ You may also be invited for coffee with team members to get a feel for our culture.

Title: Tècnic/A De Suport De Selecció, Formació I Desenvolupament
Description:
Oferta d'ocupació temporal – SUBS *****

Lloc de treball

Tècnic/a de suport de selecció, formació i desenvolupament

Divisió de Persones i Talent del Servei Català de la Salut.

Qui som?

El Servei Català de la Salut és l'organització responsable de garantir l'atenció sanitària pública, universal i de qualitat a la ciutadania de Catalunya.

Treballem per assegurar l'accessibilitat als serveis sanitaris i impulsar projectes que contribueixin a la millora contínua del sistema de salut.

En què consistirà el teu lloc de treball?

Formaràs part de la Divisió de Persones i Talent, donant suport als diferents processos vinculats a la selecció, la formació i el desenvolupament professional de les persones treballadores de l'organització.

Participaràs en iniciatives estratègiques orientades a potenciar el talent, la capacitació i el creixement professional dins del Servei Català de la Salut.

Com serà el teu dia a dia?

Entre D'altres Funcions, T'encarregaràs De

Donar suport tècnic a la gestió integral dels processos de selecció de personal.

Col·laborar en la detecció de necessitats formatives i en el disseny, seguiment i avaluació de les accions formatives de l'organització.

Participar en projectes de desenvolupament professional orientats a millorar la productivitat, la satisfacció i el creixement de les persones treballadores.

Donar suport a altres iniciatives i projectes vinculats a l'àmbit de Persones i Talent.

Què necessites per poder treballar amb nosaltres?

Requisits de la posició

Titulació universitària de diplomatura o equivalent, preferentment en Psicologia o Relacions Laborals.

Certificat de nivell de suficiència de català (C1) o equivalent.

Com podries aportar valor afegit?

Es Valorarà Especialment

Ús habitual del paquet Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint i Outlook).

Coneixements del model de gestió del Sistema Sanitari de Catalunya.

Valorem la teva capacitat de

Adaptar-te a situacions noves i entorns canviants.

Treballar en equip i generar relacions de confiança.

Orientar-te a resultats i a la millora contínua.

Generar impacte i influència positiva dins l'organització.

Aportar idees innovadores i solucions pràctiques.

Què t'oferim?

Tipologia de contracte:substitució.

Àmbit de treball:Travessera de les Corts, ******* | Edifici Olímpia | ***** Barcelona.

Retribució:nivell 3.2 *******,12 € anuals).

Jornada:completa.

El Servei Català de la Salut és una organització compromesa amb la transparència, la igualtat d'oportunitats, la diversitat i la inclusió.

Els processos de selecció es basen en criteris objectius vinculats a l'experiència professional, la formació i les competències professionals de cada candidatura.

Presentació de candidatures

Les persones interessades que compleixin els requisits poden enviar el currículum i la documentació acreditativa a l'adreça electrò******.

A L'assumpte Del Correu Cal Indicar La Referència

"SUBS ***** Tècnic/a de suport de selecció, formació i desenvolupament de la Divisió de Persones i Talent".

El termini de presentació de sol·licituds finalitza l'1 de juny de ****.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
El Data Analyst será responsable de recopilar, estructurar y analizar datos para generar insights que apoyen la toma de decisiones estratégicas en activaciones, contenido, talento, partnerships y productos basados en IA.


Trabajará directamente con el Head of Business Intelligence para construir dashboards, reports, modelos de seguimiento de campañas y análisis de audiencias y fandoms. Su misión es convertir datos complejos en información útil, clara y accionable.





Requisitos



Responsabilidades Principales:
1. Análisis de Datos e Insights


Recopilar y analizar datos de diferentes fuentes: social media, CRM, plataformas de activación, herramientas de listening y performance.


Identificar patrones, comportamientos, fandoms y oportunidades de segmentación para marcas, talentos y properties.


Generar reports semanales/mensuales con conclusiones claras y recomendaciones.


2. Dashboards & Reporting


• Construir dashboards en Power BI, Tableau o Looker para medir: o Rendimiento de campañas
o Engagement
o Conversión fan → cliente

o Crecimiento de audiencias


o Performance de contenido y talento
• Automatizar reporting para que equipos creativos, estrategia y cliente tengan

datos en tiempo real.


3. Social Listening & Trend Analysis


Operar herramientas como Brandwatch, Talkwalker, Meltwater o Pulsar.


Mapear conversaciones, microcomunidades, tendencias culturales y temas


emergentes.


Identificar insights clave para briefing, creatividad y storytelling.


4. Medición de ROI & Performance


• Apoyar en la creación de modelos de atribución de activaciones: o Leads generados


o Incremento de ventas estimado o Lift de marca
o Costes y eficiencia

• Medir el impacto de activaciones con talento, avatares y contenido IA. 5. Soporte a Proyectos y Propuestas


Preparar análisis que alimenten pitches y presentaciones estratégicas.


Transformar datos en gráficas claras, storytelling y conclusiones accionables.


Participar en el desarrollo de productos propios (AI Insights Engine,


dashboards, etc.).


Perfil Requerido: Experiencia


1–3 años en roles de Data Analyst, Digital Analyst, Research Analyst o similar.


Valorable experiencia en marketing, deportes, entretenimiento o redes sociales.


Experiencia con datasets grandes o desestructurados. Habilidades Técnicas


Excel avanzado + SQL (nivel intermedio).


Familiaridad con Python o R (no imprescindible pero deseable).


Manejo de herramientas BI (Power BI, Tableau, Looker).


Uso de plataformas de listening (Brandwatch, Talkwalker, Meltwater...).


Entendimiento de métricas de social media y performance.


Habilidades Blandas


Capacidad de sintetizar y explicar insights de forma visual y clara.


Curiosidad intelectual y mentalidad de investigación.


Detallista, ordenado y orientado a resultados.


Buena comunicación y capacidad de trabajar en equipo.


KPIs Clave del Rol


Precisión y claridad de los análisis entregados.


Calidad y escalabilidad de dashboards desarrollados.


Cumplimiento de timings y eficiencia en el reporting.


Contribución a pitches y propuestas ganadas.


Adopción interna de insights por parte de equipos creativos y de estrategia.

Title: Data Analyst I Logistics Global HQ
Description:
Glovo is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience—fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in around 65 countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index.

Job Description

YOUR MISSION

Support the optimization of logistics features, with a focus on delivery areas and supply/demand imbalances, by maintaining and improving settings, quantifying their impact, providing data-driven insights, coordinating feature rollouts, and measuring their effectiveness.

THE JOURNEY


Work closely with local/regional stakeholders, product teams and development teams, serving as a bridge between product and operations, to define how to best set up and enable products, monitor and give visibility of metrics and KPIs.
Deep-dive on business metrics, in order to explore areas of opportunity and enable data-driven decision-making, based on applied statistics and probability techniques
Develop and maintain scalable and self-service visualization tools and storytelling dashboards.
Build optimization processes to define the best tuning of every feature on each geography.
Build robust relationships with stakeholders acting as a strategic and supportive link between the technology, business and product.
Support recurrent processes within the team, enabling the adjustment of tools to business needs
Continuously explore and refine key operational metrics (delivery time, efficiency, costs), gaining a comprehensive understanding of Glovo’s logistics.


Qualifications

WHAT YOU WILL BRING TO THE RIDE


1-2 years of professional experience outside of an academic and internship setting, in a quantitative analysis role
Excellent SQL and Excel/GoogleSheet skills
Solid proficiency in statistical programming (Python/R) and experience working with popular tools such as Pandas, SciPy, Seaborn, Jupyter/iPython notebooks, R Markdown.
Knowledge of visualization tools like Tableau, Looker, PowerBI, ...
Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills
Great spoken and written English.


Individuals representing diverse profiles, encompassing various genders, ethnicities, and backgrounds, are less likely to apply for this role if they do not possess solid experience in 100% of these areas. Even if it seems you don't meet our musts don't let it stop you, we are all about finding the best talent out there! Skills can be learned, and embracing diversity is invaluable.

We Believe Driven Talent Deserves


💪 Top-notch private health insurance to keep you at your peak.
🍔 Monthly Glovo credit to satisfy your cravings!
💳 Cobee discounts on transportation, food, and even kindergarten expenses.
🏊 Discounted gym memberships to keep you energized.
🏖️ Extra time off, the freedom to work from home two days a week, and the opportunity to work from anywhere for up to three weeks a year!
👪 Enhanced parental leave, and office-based nursery.
🧠 Online therapy and wellbeing benefits to ensure your mental well-being.


Here at Glovo, we thrive on diversity, we believe it enhances our teams, products, and culture. We know that the best ideas come from a mashup of brilliant diverse minds. This is why we are committed to providing equal opportunities to talent from all backgrounds - all genders, racial/diverse backgrounds, abilities, ages, sexual orientations and all other unique characteristics that make you YOU. We will encourage you to bring your authentic self to work, fostering an inclusive environment where everyone feels heard.

Feel free to note your pronouns in your application (e.g., she/her/hers, he/him/his, they/them/theirs, etc).

So, ready to take the wheel and make this the ride of your life?

Delve into our culture by taking a peek at our Instagram and check out our Linkedin and website!

Additional Information

At Glovo, your success is defined by both results and behaviors. We hire for excellence in craft and for the Leadership Principles that shape how we think, decide, and collaborate. What you achieve matters and how you achieve it defines us. Together, they move the business forward and deliver great experiences. Learn more about our Leadership Principles here.

Title: Junior Data Analyst
Place: Sant Cugat del Vallès, Catalonia, Spain
Description:
About Us

With over 185 years of history, we are a leading health and wellness company. Our portfolio includes iconic brands such as Aquilea, Fisiocrem, Laborest, Sidroga, Biodramina, Aerored, Fave de Fuca, Halibut, Ems, and Depuralina, with a strong presence across major European markets.

We believe in the power of nature, enhanced by science, as the best way to improve human health and wellbeing sustainably. Our goal is to create a positive impact on both people's lives and the planet. We are currently seeking a highly motivated and skilled Junior Data Analyst to join our team.

Your Mission

We are currently looking to strengthen our Data team by appointing a Junior Data Analyst who will support the development of reporting and data visualization solutions across key areas of the business. As part of the Data Department, you will work closely with senior data profiles and business stakeholders, acting as a bridge between data and decision-making. You will contribute to transforming data into clear, reliable, and actionable insights, supporting a data-driven culture in an international and dynamic environment.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

In this role, you will be expected to:


Design, build, and maintain dashboards and reports in Power BI for different business areas (e.g., sales, operations, finance)
Gather and understand reporting requirements from business users, translating needs into clear and insightful visualizations
Perform exploratory data analysis to identify trends, anomalies, and improvement opportunities
Ensure data quality and consistency across reports by identifying and addressing discrepancies
Collaborate with Data Engineering teams to support the development of optimized data models for reporting
Support the automation of recurring reports and assist users in understanding and using dashboards effectively


Sector: Industria farmacéutica

Función: Ingeniería / Proyectos

Dirige a otros: No

Nivel profesional: Empleado nivel inicial

You'll excel if you have...


1-2 years of experience in data analysis, reporting, or similar roles (relevant internships are also considered).
Solid hands-on experience with Power BI (dashboard creation, data modeling basics, DAX, Power Query), along with strong SQL skills for data extraction and transformation, and advanced Excel capabilities
Good understanding of data modeling concepts (e.g., star schema, table relationships) and experience working with structured data sources
Strong analytical mindset with high attention to detail, ensuring accuracy, consistency, and reliability of data and reporting outputs
Ability to communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, translating business needs into actionable insights
Proactive, organized, and eager to learn, with the ability to manage multiple priorities in a dynamic environment
Familiarity with additional BI tools (e.g., Tableau, Looker, Qlik), cloud environments (Azure, Microsoft Fabric, Databricks), or business systems such as SAP, Salesforce, or Odoo will be considered a plus

Title: Dependiente/a UNIQLO Barcelona

¿Qué estamos buscando?

Estamos buscando Dependiente/a para incorporarse al equipo de nuestras tiendas de Barcelona para la temporada de primavera-verano: jornadas de 35 o 40 horas semanales con total flexibilidad horaria.

¿A qué contribuirá tu talento?


Ofrecer un alto estándar de calidad enfocado a la atención al cliente: dar la bienvenida a los clientes, escuchar activamente sus ideas sobre productos y servicios, resolver sus dudas e inquietudes, atender la caja, probadores, etc...
Crear un Sales Floor excelente: gestionar las entregas de mercancía, reposición del espacio de ventas y del almacén, cooperar con el departamento de Visual Merchandising, etc.
Formar parte de un equipo unido, colaborar activamente y con entusiasmo con todos los miembros del equipo de una forma proactiva



¿Por qué trabajar en UNIQLO?


Contrato fijo discontinuo de 35 o 40 horas semanales
Salario: 18.725 € a 21.400 € / brutos anuales según las horas contratadas.
Dos días de descanso a la semana
Oportunidades reales de desarrollo profesional
Beneficios sociales:
Descuento de empleado
Seguro de vida desde el primer día
Acceso gratuito a academia de idiomas online
Retribución flexible, una vez que se supere el periodo de prueba
Oportunidad de trabajar temporalmente en el extranjero dando soporte a UNIQLO en otros países
Oportunidad de ser embajador de UNIQLO en nuestros diferentes proyectos como Live Station, Sostenibilidad...



Requisitos mínimos


Gran afinidad con los valores de UNIQLO y la filosofía LifeWear
Persona con alta disponibilidad, pudiendo trabajar de lunes a domingo en horarios establecidos entre las 6 y las 23h y turnos nocturnos.
Se valorará positivamente la experiencia previa, aunque no es necesaria, siempre y cuando te motiven los entornos de trabajo dinámicos y orientados al cliente.



¡Únete a nosotros y haz crecer el número de fans de UNIQLO!

Title: Administrativo/a de Recursos Humanos en tienda
Description:
¿Quieres formar parte de un equipo dinámico y en plena expansión? ¿Buscas oportunidades reales de crecimiento profesional? ¡Este es tu sitio!

UNIQLO es la marca líder de Fast Retailing Group, la tercera empresa de moda del mundo. UNIQLO es más que una marca de ropa. Es una forma de pensar. Una conciencia firme que busca constantemente el cambio, la diversidad y el desafío a lo establecido.

¿Qué estamos buscando?

Estamos buscando un/a administrativo/a de Recursos Humanos en tienda para nuestro equipo de Barcelona. Su misión principal será liderar la administración de recursos humanos y la ejecución de las tareas de oficina en la tienda, garantizando la precisión de las operaciones de recursos humanos y manteniendo informadas a las personas trabajadoras, reforzando el engagement y un entorno de trabajo positivo, para garantizar en todo momento que el equipo de Management de la tienda pueda centrarse únicamente en la gestión de la tienda y el desarrollo de las personas.

¿A qué contribuirá tu talento?


Mantener actualizado nuestro sistema interno de fichajes: fichajes del equipo de tienda, vacaciones, enfermedad, permisos, etc.
Mantener actualizado el sistema interno de la empresa (Workday) con la información del equipo.
Realizar el onboarding de las nuevas personas trabajadoras durante la primera semana: formación inicial, información en nuestro sistema al día, fotos en el board, incluirlos en trackers tienda, etc.
Tener al día todos los documentos contractuales del equipo en los sistemas y en los expedientes, tratando toda la información con la más absoluta confidencialidad y de acuerdo con la normativa de protección de datos.
Ser la persona responsable, junto con el equipo de management de tienda, que se sigan las políticas y procesos de la tienda.
Gestionar y hacer seguimiento de pedidos de empresa: uniformes, manuales, Mark Down stickers, material de oficina, etc.
Gestionar el área de Click and Collect de tienda acorde a los periodos establecidos por el departamento de Omni-Channel.
Gestionar los posibles problemas de IT de la tienda.
Mantener actualizada en todo momento la información de la compañía en el Back of House.
Cuando sea necesario, dar apoyo al equipo de ventas, saludar y dirigirse a los clientes con amabilidad y cortesía y proveer un excelente servicio al cliente en planta.



Requisitos mínimos:


Experiencia como administrativo/a o como generalista de Recursos Humanos de al menos 2 años, idealmente en entornos dinámicos.
Se valorará la experiencia previa trabajando como dependiente/a de tienda.
Dominio de Sistema de Recursos Humanos y del paquete office: Microsoft Word, Excel, Powerpoint y Outlook.
Capacidad de adaptación y de trabajar bajo presión en entornos dinámicos.
Discreción y confidencialidad.
Pasión por el retail y por la atención al cliente.



¿Por qué trabajar en UNIQLO?


Contrato temporal de 40 horas.
Horario de mañana de lunes a domingo, con dos días de descanso a la semana.
Salario competitivo por encima de convenio.
Oportunidades reales de desarrollo profesional.
Beneficios sociales, tales como descuento de empleado, seguro médico pagado por la empresa, acceso gratuito a academia de idiomas online...
Oportunidad de trabajar temporalmente en el extranjero dando soporte a UNIQLO en otros países.
Oportunidad de ser embajador de UNIQLO en nuestros diferentes proyectos como Live Station, Sostenibilidad...



¡Únete a nosotros y haz crecer el número de fans de UNIQLO!

UNIQLO es un empleador inclusivo y valoramos las candidaturas de todos los perfiles, independientemente de su edad, raza, sexo, orientación sexual, discapacidad o procedencia.

Title: Administratiu/va de Gestió Laboral (RRHH) – Indefinit + 37,5h + 2 tardes lliures
Description:
Vols desenvolupar la teva carrera en l'àmbit laboral dins d'una entitat amb impacte social real?

A la Fundació Pere Tarrés busquem un/a Administratiu/va de Gestió Laboral per incorporar-se al nostre equip de Recursos Humans.

Treballaràs en un entorn dinàmic i col·laboratiu, donant suport als processos clau de gestió laboral i contribuint al bon funcionament de l'equip.

Què t'oferim?


Contracte indefinit
Jornada completa de 37,5h setmanals
2 tardes lliures a la setmana (divendres + una altra tarda)
Possibilitat de teletreball (1-2 dies/setmana després dels primers mesos)
Entorn de treball col·laboratiu i amb bon ambient
Projecte amb impacte social real
Oportunitats d'aprenentatge i creixement professional



Quines seran les teves funcions?


Gestió d'altes, baixes i variacions a la Seguretat Social
Suport en processos de contractació, especialment substitucions
Preparació de documentació laboral (certificats, subvencions, etc.)
Manteniment i actualització d'expedients de personal
Gestió de comunicacions amb organismes oficials (Sistema RED, Contrat@, Certific@)



Si ets una persona responsable, compromesa i amb ganes d’aportar valor en un projecte amb impacte social, et volem conèixer!

Requisitos:


CFGS en Gestió Administrativa o formació equivalent
Valorable Grau en Relacions Laborals i Recursos Humans
Experiència mínima de 2 anys en administració de personal
Coneixement de normativa laboral bàsica
Experiència en gestió d'altes, baixes i contractació
Domini de català i castellà (oral i escrit)
Bon nivell d'Office i entorns digitals
Valorable experiència amb ERP de RRHH i plataformes oficials (Sistema RED, Contrat@, Certific@)
Perfil organitzat, rigorós i amb capacitat de treball en equip

Title: DATA ANALYST
Description:
About

Joko helps consumers shop smarter. Their ambition is to revolutionize how people shop, empowering them to find what they need, make informed decisions, and save money.

Joko is a tech company founded in Paris. Their team of 105+ talents is international and spread across Paris, Barcelona, and New York, with some working remotely.

As a certified B Corporation, they are committed to making a difference for the communities they serve, including the 6 million consumers already using Joko to save money every day at over 10,000 merchants.

Over the years, they have expanded their value proposition to help consumers make smarter shopping decisions with features such as cash back, buy now pay later, automatic coupons, price drop alerts, carbon footprint tracking, and more. Today, they are dedicating significant resources to an AI-powered assistant that helps users find the right product based on criteria like price, quality, or environmental impact across the global e-commerce catalog.

After reaching profitability in their core market, they are expanding internationally with a primary focus on the US.

It’s still day 1 at Joko; come build the future of shopping with Joko.

Job Description

At Joko, we help consumers shop smarter. Our mission is to revolutionize shopping, empowering people to find what they need, make informed decisions, and save money.

Founded in Paris, Joko is a tech company and certified B Corp with over 105 talents across Paris, Barcelona, and New York (and beyond). More than 6 million users already save money every day at 10,000+ merchants with Joko.

From cashback and automatic coupons to price alerts and carbon tracking, we keep expanding our products to make shopping smarter. We’re now building an AI-powered shopping assistant to help users find the best products by price, quality, and environmental impact.

Having reached profitability in our core market, we’re now scaling globally, with a strong focus on the US.

It’s still day 1, come build the future of shopping with us!

This position is remote-friendly.

🧚🏻 Our Data team

The Data team at Joko is turning mountains of data into actionable insights for all the teams! The Data team is part of our Operations department led by our COO, and our mission is to empower the company to make informed decisions.

More Specifically, The Team's Responsibilities Are


State-of-the-art analytics & data science: We want to be at the forefront of analytics and data science by building top-notch analyses and tools. Our goal is to allow teams to leverage powerful insights from advanced reporting and predictive models.
AI-driven autonomy for stakeholders: We are doubling down on the combination of AI and data to unlock a new level of autonomy for our stakeholders, seamlessly bridging data insights with the AI tools we use, built on secure and trustworthy foundations.
Spread the data culture: At Joko, we have a strong engineering and tech culture across all teams. We work hand-in-hand with our stakeholders, providing support and training on data tools, and building close relationships to ensure our solutions align perfectly with their operational needs and evolve with them over time.


🎯 What you will do

As a Data Analyst, you will have a cross-functional role and collaborate closely with teams to understand our data and develop insights.


Advanced analytics & data science: You will explore and analyze data to uncover trends, patterns, and potential issues that will support decision-making processes across all teams. You will also contribute to data science initiatives by building predictive models and applying statistics to generate deeper insights and drive measurable business impact.
Reporting and Data Visualization: You will design and create dashboards and data visualizations that empower stakeholders to explore data autonomously. Leveraging AI tools to move faster, your focus will be on what matters most: defining the right metrics, surfacing meaningful insights, and ensuring data is understood and acted upon across the company.
AI and data integration: You will actively contribute to bridging our data with the AI tools we use, ensuring insights are integrated and maintained over time.
Stakeholder collaboration: You will work hand-in-hand with stakeholders to understand their needs, collect their feedback, and evangelize data usage to help them make smarter choices and become more autonomous over time.
Continuous Learning and Improvement: As "never stop learning" is one of our values, you will grow along the way and keep up with the latest analytical methods, AI developments, and tools in our data stack.


👀 Who we're looking for


Experience: You have 2+ years of professional experience in data analysis (relevant internships can count). We hire across different seniority levels, so we encourage you to apply even if you are more experienced.
Interest in AI: You are genuinely curious about AI and its applications, and eager to leverage it in your day-to-day work to move faster and create more impact.
Mindset: You have an entrepreneurial mindset, you like challenges, you welcome feedback and you are willing to get better every day to reach excellence.
Problem-solving & Analytical skills: You love solving complex problems and analyzing data.
Coding knowledge: Mastering SQL and Python is not mandatory, as you can still learn when joining, but it's a plus.
Business acumen: You can understand the needs of your business stakeholders and get the big picture of how the business is running.
Communication: You know how to present your conclusions clearly and concisely (written and oral).
Education: You have graduated from a top-tier business or engineering school.
Languages: You are fluent in English, both written and spoken.


💎 Our perks

(Some of the benefits listed below are available to full-time positions only)

At Joko, we believe that flexibility and trust are essential. Our work environment reflects this through:


Flexible remote : If you live in Paris, you can choose to work from our office or from home with no constraints. If you live elsewhere, we can provide access to a coworking space and a coworking budget.
Work from anywhere : Want to spend a month in Italy while working? You can work from most countries in the world for up to 3 months per year.


On Top Of That, We Offer Plenty Of Perks


💸 Top-market compensation
📈 Equity for everyone with the chance to own a piece of what you build
🤖 Half-day each week dedicated to leveling up with AI by exploring new tools, iterating hard, and sharpening your skills
🌴 Yearly offsite in amazing locations and budget for team-building events & monthly in-person gatherings
💪 Contribution to your ClassPass subscription
🍼 8-week leave paid 100% for the second parent
…and much more, check the full list here!


🤝 Our hiring process


Intro call: Quick screening with the Hiring Manager or the Talent team.
Step 1 – Team interview (45 min): Conversation with two Joko team members (could include the Hiring Manager, people from the team you’d join, or colleagues from other teams).
Step 2 – Role-specific assessments
For non-engineering roles: A take-home case study followed by a 45-min interview. We assess both your output and how you think in real time. The exercise will be relevant to your role (e.g. analysis, strategy, or process design).
For engineering roles: A 90-min live technical interview on CoderPad covering code understanding, review, system design, and product thinking (with AI serving as a collaboration tool).
Step 3 – Leadership interview (45 min): Conversation with a SteerCo member and a Founder.
References: Up to 3 calls with former colleagues or managers.

☕ You may also be invited for coffee with team members to get a feel for our culture.

Additional Information


Contract Type: Full-Time
Location: Paris, Barcelona
Possible full remote
Salary: between 48000€ and 84000€ / year

About

Joko helps consumers shop smarter. Their ambition is to revolutionize how people shop, empowering them to find what they need, make informed decisions, and save money.

Joko is a tech company founded in Paris. Their team of 105+ talents is international and spread across Paris, Barcelona, and New York, with some working remotely.

As a certified B Corporation, they are committed to making a difference for the communities they serve, including the 6 million consumers already using Joko to save money every day at over 10,000 merchants.

Over the years, they have expanded their value proposition to help consumers make smarter shopping decisions with features such as cash back, buy now pay later, automatic coupons, price drop alerts, carbon footprint tracking, and more. Today, they are dedicating significant resources to an AI-powered assistant that helps users find the right product based on criteria like price, quality, or environmental impact across the global e-commerce catalog.

After reaching profitability in their core market, they are expanding internationally with a primary focus on the US.

It’s still day 1 at Joko; come build the future of shopping with Joko.

Job Description

At Joko, we help consumers shop smarter. Our mission is to revolutionize shopping, empowering people to find what they need, make informed decisions, and save money.

Founded in Paris, Joko is a tech company and certified B Corp with over 105 talents across Paris, Barcelona, and New York (and beyond). More than 6 million users already save money every day at 10,000+ merchants with Joko.

From cashback and automatic coupons to price alerts and carbon tracking, we keep expanding our products to make shopping smarter. We’re now building an AI-powered shopping assistant to help users find the best products by price, quality, and environmental impact.

Having reached profitability in our core market, we’re now scaling globally, with a strong focus on the US.

It’s still day 1, come build the future of shopping with us!

This position is remote-friendly.

🧚🏻 Our Data team

The Data team at Joko is turning mountains of data into actionable insights for all the teams! The Data team is part of our Operations department led by our COO, and our mission is to empower the company to make informed decisions.

More Specifically, The Team's Responsibilities Are

  • State-of-the-art analytics & data science: We want to be at the forefront of analytics and data science by building top-notch analyses and tools. Our goal is to allow teams to leverage powerful insights from advanced reporting and predictive models.
  • AI-driven autonomy for stakeholders: We are doubling down on the combination of AI and data to unlock a new level of autonomy for our stakeholders, seamlessly bridging data insights with the AI tools we use, built on secure and trustworthy foundations.
  • Spread the data culture: At Joko, we have a strong engineering and tech culture across all teams. We work hand-in-hand with our stakeholders, providing support and training on data tools, and building close relationships to ensure our solutions align perfectly with their operational needs and evolve with them over time.

🎯 What you will do

As a Data Analyst, you will have a cross-functional role and collaborate closely with teams to understand our data and develop insights.

  • Advanced analytics & data science: You will explore and analyze data to uncover trends, patterns, and potential issues that will support decision-making processes across all teams. You will also contribute to data science initiatives by building predictive models and applying statistics to generate deeper insights and drive measurable business impact.
  • Reporting and Data Visualization: You will design and create dashboards and data visualizations that empower stakeholders to explore data autonomously. Leveraging AI tools to move faster, your focus will be on what matters most: defining the right metrics, surfacing meaningful insights, and ensuring data is understood and acted upon across the company.
  • AI and data integration: You will actively contribute to bridging our data with the AI tools we use, ensuring insights are integrated and maintained over time.
  • Stakeholder collaboration: You will work hand-in-hand with stakeholders to understand their needs, collect their feedback, and evangelize data usage to help them make smarter choices and become more autonomous over time.
  • Continuous Learning and Improvement: As "never stop learning" is one of our values, you will grow along the way and keep up with the latest analytical methods, AI developments, and tools in our data stack.

👀 Who we're looking for

  • Experience: You have 2+ years of professional experience in data analysis (relevant internships can count). We hire across different seniority levels, so we encourage you to apply even if you are more experienced.
  • Interest in AI: You are genuinely curious about AI and its applications, and eager to leverage it in your day-to-day work to move faster and create more impact.
  • Mindset: You have an entrepreneurial mindset, you like challenges, you welcome feedback and you are willing to get better every day to reach excellence.
  • Problem-solving & Analytical skills: You love solving complex problems and analyzing data.
  • Coding knowledge: Mastering SQL and Python is not mandatory, as you can still learn when joining, but it's a plus.
  • Business acumen: You can understand the needs of your business stakeholders and get the big picture of how the business is running.
  • Communication: You know how to present your conclusions clearly and concisely (written and oral).
  • Education: You have graduated from a top-tier business or engineering school.
  • Languages: You are fluent in English, both written and spoken.

Title: Data Analyst (Fulfilment)
Description:
About Nivoda

Nivoda’s growth trajectory has skyrocketed over the past 12 months, and we continue to expand across new regions at an unprecedented pace. Our DNA centers on understanding our customers' needs and offering them a seamless experience. With a growing team based in major cities worldwide, including London, New York, Hong Kong, and Mumbai, Nivoda is becoming the go-to marketplace for the global jewelry industry.

We are bold, innovative, and relentless in our pursuit of excellence as we transform an industry steeped in tradition.

About The Role

Nivoda is looking for a talented Data Analyst to join our Global Fulfillment Team. In this role, you will be the primary analytical partner for our Fulfillment Department, ensuring that our supply chain, logistics, and delivery operations are optimized for speed, cost-effectiveness, and reliability.

You will bridge the gap between complex logistical data and actionable business strategy. The ideal candidate is a SQL expert who enjoys digging into messy data to find the "why" behind the numbers and who knows how to leverage modern AI tools to work faster and smarter. You will play a key role in monitoring fulfilment performance, identifying issues, and enabling the team to move faster with data.

What You'll Do


Operational Optimization: Analyze fulfilment workflows to identify bottlenecks across the supply chain and propose data-backed solutions to improve delivery speed, cost efficiency, and reliability.
Reporting & Dashboards: Design, build, and maintain automated dashboards tracking key fulfillment KPIs, including shipping costs, transit times, SLA adherence, and hub performance. Ensure data is accurate, accessible, and actionable for stakeholders.
SQL & Data Analysis: Independently write and own complex SQL queries to extract, transform, and analyze large fulfilment datasets. Translate business questions into structured queries, build reusable data models, and ensure consistent KPI definitions across reporting.
Insights & Decision Support: Go beyond reporting to proactively identify trends, anomalies, and opportunities within fulfilment data. Generate clear, actionable insights and recommendations that drive operational and strategic decision-making.
Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner closely with Operations, Logistics, Product, and Data teams to understand pain points, support decision-making, and provide analytical input into key strategic initiatives.
Data Modeling: Work with Data Engineers to ensure fulfillment data is clean, well-structured, and scalable within the data warehouse, supporting long-term analytics and reporting needs.
Quality Assurance: Monitor data integrity across fulfilment systems, proactively identifying and resolving discrepancies to maintain trust in reporting and operational metrics.
Performance Monitoring: Track key fulfilment KPIs on an ongoing basis, proactively flagging issues, anomalies, and performance deviations. Investigate root causes using data and support continuous monitoring of courier performance, batching efficiency, and delivery speed to ensure consistent operational reliability.
Leverage AI Tools: Use AI tools to accelerate analysis, automate repetitive tasks and draft written outputs. We expect this person to be a practitioner of AI-assisted work, not just someone who is curious about it.


What You'll Need

Required Qualifications:


Experience: 3+ years of experience in a Data Analyst or Business Analyst role
Advanced SQL: Strong proficiency writing complex, performant queries. Comfortable with joins, aggregations, window functions, and working with large datasets independently
Analytical Rigor: Proven ability to translate raw data into clear insights and recommendations that influence business decisions
Problem Solving: Ability to investigate ambiguous problems, identify root causes, and structure data-driven solutions
Domain Interest: Interest in logistics, e-commerce, marketplaces, or supply chain operations


Highly Desirable:


Modern Data Stack: Experience working with cloud data warehouses such as Snowflake orBigQuery
Data Transformation: Exposure to tools like dbt or experience structuring reusable datasets/models
Visualization Tools: Experience building dashboards in Looker, Tableau, or Power BI


What we offer

🕰️ Flexible working hours and a vibrant company culture

💻 Remote work

🧠 Plenty of opportunities for growth and learning

🏖️ Unlimited holiday allowance

🚀 Chance to join and contribute to a company during its exponential expansion phase

Nivoda is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace dedicated to promoting diversity. We don’t discriminate on the basis of race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status or disability status.

Even if it seems you don't meet 100% of our musts don't let it stop you, we are all about finding the best talent out there! Skills can be learned, and embracing diversity is invaluable.

Please note: Our Talent Acquisition Team is international coming from across the world. We kindly ask you to please submit your CV and application in English so that it can be reviewed correctly.

This is a full time, permanent position that's remote within Europe. Unfortunately, we are unable to offer sponsorship at this time.


If after reading this job description you believe this is not the best fit for you, we’d encourage you to join our Talent Pool so we can keep you in mind as new roles open up. You can sign up here: Nivoda Talent Pool


This ensures you're among the first to hear about openings aligned with your skills and interests.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
¿Te motiva transformar datos en decisiones estratégicas reales?

¿Te interesa ir más allá del reporting y participar en la evolución de una arquitectura de datos moderna y escalable?

Buscamos un/a Data Analyst con visión de negocio, mentalidad analítica y capacidad de liderazgo técnico para llevar nuestra analítica al siguiente nivel.

Tendrás un rol clave en la compañía: no solo crearás dashboards, sino que participarás activamente en la evolución de nuestro data stack y en cómo construimos productos analíticos escalables.

¿Cuál será tu impacto?

Serás el puente estratégico entre negocio y datos, liderando la generación de insights avanzados y contribuyendo a la construcción de una capa de datos robusta, gobernada y preparada para escalar.

Trabajarás de forma transversal con equipos de negocio, CSM, management, operaciones y tecnología, aportando visión analítica, criterio técnico y capacidad de ejecución.

¿Qué harás en tu día a día?

Diseñar y evolucionar productos analíticos avanzados y escalables.

Traducir necesidades estratégicas de negocio en soluciones analíticas accionables.

Participar en el diseño y evolución del data warehouse en Snowflake.

Construir y mantener modelos de datos usando dbt, asegurando calidad, trazabilidad y escalabilidad.

Liderar la exploración avanzada de datos para detectar oportunidades, riesgos y palancas de crecimiento.

Definir estándares, buenas prácticas y modelos de datos para reporting y analítica.

Impulsar la adopción de herramientas de datos dentro de la compañía.

Colaborar estrechamente con CTO y Data Lead en la evolución de la estrategia y roadmap analítico.

Mentorizar a perfiles junior/mid del equipo de datos.

¿Que buscamos?

Experiencia sólida en análisis de datos y generación de insights de negocio.

Nivel avanzado de SQL y experiencia con modelos de datos complejos.

Experiencia trabajando con data warehouses (idealmente Snowflake o similares).

Conocimiento o experiencia con dbt o herramientas de transformación de datos.

Experiencia en herramientas BI (Power BI, Metabase, Looker, Tableau…).

Capacidad para comunicar insights de forma clara a perfiles técnicos y no técnicos.

Perfil autónomo, proactivo y orientado a impacto.

Mentalidad estratégica y visión de negocio.

Valoraremos especialmente

Experiencia en entornos SaaS, startups o scaleups.

Experiencia en diseño de modelos de datos analíticos (star schema, data marts…).

Conocimientos de Python o analítica avanzada.

Experiencia contribuyendo a la definición de arquitecturas de datos modernas.

Experiencia impulsando cultura data-driven.

Experiencia en sector de field marketing/consumer goods.

¿Qué ofrecemos?

Alta autonomía y capacidad real de influencia.

Participación directa en decisiones estratégicas (incluyendo arquitectura de datos).

Entorno tecnológico moderno (Snowflake, dbt, BI tools).

Proyectos con impacto tangible en negocio.

Flexibilidad y cultura basada en confianza.

Oportunidad de construir y escalar la función analítica dentro de la compañía.

Title: Financial Data Analyst (con IA)
Description:
Estamos buscando un perfil enfocado en análisis financiero y elaboración de informes, para incorporarse al área de Assurance (auditoría, forensic y proyectos especiales).

El candidato trabajará junto a un equipo de auditores senior, por lo que no se requiere un perfil altamente especializado en contabilidad avanzada, pero sí una base sólida en finanzas y capacidad de aprendizaje rápido.

Responsabilidades principales


Elaboración de informes financieros, incluyendo informes periciales y especiales
Participación en proyectos de due diligence y auditoría
Análisis de estados financieros consolidados
Redacción de informes con alta calidad narrativa y claridad analítica
Apoyo al equipo de auditoría en el análisis de información financiera compleja
Identificación de riesgos, desviaciones y puntos críticos en la información financiera



Requisitos imprescindibles


Formación en Economía, ADE o similar
Experiencia mínima de 2 años en contabilidad, auditoría o despacho financiero
Capacidad analítica y atención al detalle
Mentalidad de aprendizaje y crecimiento profesional
Interés por desarrollarse en el área de auditoría y análisis financiero
Experiencia o conocimientos en Data o herramientas de IA aplicada a análisis financiero
Interés por la tecnología (sin necesidad de programar)



Perfil ideal

Buscamos una persona con:


Alta capacidad analítica y estructurada
Motivación por aprender y desarrollarse en auditoría
Capacidad para investigar, interpretar datos y extraer conclusiones
Buen nivel de redacción y comunicación escrita
Perfil joven, flexible y con ambición de crecimiento
Enfoque práctico, resolutivo y orientado a resultados



Condiciones


Horario: 9:00 – 18:00 (viernes hasta 14:00)
Teletrabajo: 2 días por semana
Ubicación: Barcelona
Salario: 30000€-33000€

Title: Recepcionista
Description:
Descripción de la empresa

Somos parte del grupo Accor, líder mundial en hospitalidad con presencia en más de 100 países y una amplia cartera de marcas reconocidas internacionalmente. Nos caracterizamos por ofrecer experiencias únicas y memorables a nuestros huéspedes, combinando excelencia en el servicio, innovación y un fuerte compromiso con la sostenibilidad. Formar parte de nuestro equipo significa unirse a una compañía que valora la diversidad, impulsa el talento y ofrece oportunidades de crecimiento a nivel local e internacional dentro del grupo Accor.

Descripción del empleo

Nos encontramos en la búsqueda de un/a profesional para incorporarse a nuestro equipo como Recepcionista. Buscamos una persona proactiva, con excelentes habilidades de comunicación y orientación al cliente, que disfrute trabajando en un entorno dinámico y multicultural.

Entre sus principales responsabilidades se incluyen la acogida y registro de huéspedes (check-in/check-out), la gestión de reservas, la atención telefónica y la resolución de consultas, garantizando en todo momento una experiencia de calidad alineada con los estándares del grupo.

Requisitos


Nivel de inglés intermedio (imprescindible); se valorará el conocimiento de otros idiomas.
Excelentes habilidades de comunicación y orientación al cliente.
Capacidad de organización, gestión del tiempo y resolución de incidencias.
Actitud proactiva y capacidad para trabajar en equipo.
No se requiere experiencia previa.

Title: Administratiu/va Assistencial (Suplència)
Description:
Lloc de treball

La persona s’incorporarà a les àrees de la UMEG (Unitat de Medicina de l’Esport) i de RHB (Rehabilitació de Medicina Física i Salut), desenvolupant funcions administratives i de suport assistencial dins d’un entorn multidisciplinari.

Funcions principals


Gestió administrativa d’agendes mèdiques i assistencials, així com la citació i coordinació de visites i tractaments.
Tramitació d’autoritzacions, control documental així com, facturació i cobrament.
Atenció i seguiment de pacients, incloent el control d’assistències i la gestió de documentació clínica.
Suport assistencial als professionals sanitaris en la realització de proves i controls bàsics de constants.
Coordinació amb equips mèdics i fisioterapeutes per al correcte desenvolupament de l’activitat assistencial.
Gestió de material sanitari i suport en el seguiment d’incidències relacionades amb equips i recursos de la unitat.
Col·laboració en accions de promoció i fidelització vinculades a l’activitat de medicina esportiva i rehabilitació.



Competències professionals


Orientació al pacient
Habilitats de comunicació
Capacitat de treball en equip
Pro activitat



S’ofereix


Incorporació temporal per cobertura aproximada de juliol a octubre.
Jornada de dilluns a divendres amb alternança d’horaris de matí i tarda.
Treballaràs en un equip multidisciplinari i amb una visió centrada en la persona emmarcats en projectes que implementen la Experiència del Pacient com a valor afegit a la institució.



Requisits:

Requeriments


Cicle formatiu de grau superior en Documentació i Administració Sanitària.
Cicle formatiu de grau mitjà en Tècnic/a en Cures Auxiliars d'Infermeria.



Es valorarà


Experiència prèvia en un lloc similar.
Coneixements d’eines informàtiques i gestió administrativa
Coneixement en gestió de mútues i circuits assistencials.
Experiència en atenció al pacient i suport assistencial.

Title: Oferta de treball de tècnic/a sènior per al projecte AI Factory - CSUC U405
Description:
Coordinar i liderar les activitats del CSUC dins del projecte AI Factory, actuant com a enllaç amb els diferents agents de l'ecosistema. Realitzar tasques de prospecció, contacte i assessorament a empreses i altres entitats per promoure l'adopció de la intel·ligència artificial i facilitar-ne l'accés als serveis de la AI Factory. Fer el seguiment i acompanyament de les empreses participants, avaluant-ne la maduresa digital i orientant-les en el procés d'implantació de solucions d'IA.

Així mateix, gestionar els indicadors i la justificació del projecte, impulsar accions de difusió i transferència de coneixement, supervisar els continguts web i coordinar les activitats de prospecció, seguiment i suport operatiu vinculades al projecte.

Title: Data Analyst – Power BI
Place: Sant Cugat del Vallès, Catalonia, Spain
Description:
En BETWEEN Technology, buscamos un/a Data Analyst para unirse a nuestro equipo en Sant Cugat . Buscamos un/a Analista de Datos con al menos 2-3 años de experiencia en herramientas de análisis y visualización como Excel, Power BI, Power Query, DAX, y conocimientos en Python.

Esta posición contribuye al desarrollo de informes y análisis de datos, principalmente mediante Power BI, proporcionando soporte al equipo de Reporting. Su labor será asegurar la disponibilidad, trazabilidad y calidad de la información.

Responsabilidades Principales


Análisis de datos: Recopilar, transformar y analizar datos provenientes de diversas fuentes utilizando Excel, Power BI y Power Query, con el objetivo de generar informes para el negocio.
Modelado de datos: Diseñar y mantener modelos de datos robustos mediante DAX, que permitan realizar análisis complejos y cálculos personalizados adaptados a las necesidades de cada área.
Desarrollo de informes: Crear dashboards e informes interactivos en Power BI que faciliten la visualización clara y efectiva de los resultados, orientados a distintos niveles de la organización.
Automatización de procesos: Utilizar Python para procesamiento de datos, mejorando la eficiencia operativa y reducir errores manuales.
Cierres mensuales y reporting corporativo: Participar activamente en los cierres mensuales, asegurando la correcta consolidación de datos y elaboración de reportes que se remiten a las oficinas de Corporate, cumpliendo con los estándares de calidad y plazos establecidos.


Requisitos


Mínimo 2-3 años de experiencia en análisis y manipulación de datos con Excel.
Experiencia demostrable en el desarrollo de informes interactivos con Power BI, DAX para modelado de datos.
Experiencia en procesos de cierre mensual y reporting corporativo.
Conocimientos en Python.
Capacidad para comunicar resultados de forma clara y efectiva.
Autonomía en el trabajo y capacidad para colaborar en equipos multidisciplinares.


Requisitos valorables


Conocimiento de bases de datos: SQL, Fabrik…

Title: AI Trainee
Description:
About The Role

We are looking for a technically minded AI talent to join Allianz Technology and support the launch and growth of our AI Community of Practice (CoP) and overall AI initiatives.

You will work closely with the IT Strategist and the AI Leaders, connecting strategy and execution across all AI & Generative AI projects. Your mission: to boost AI visibility, engagement, and understanding across Allianz by creating high-quality AI content, supporting community activities, and helping bridge communication between technical teams and the wider organization.

This is a hands-on role — ideal for someone who loves exploring AI models, prompt engineering, and data workflows, and wants to apply that knowledge in a global enterprise environment.

Key Responsibilities


Map and analyze all AI & GenAI initiatives, products, and tools developed across Allianz Technology.
Create and curate AI content — articles, summaries, visual explainers, and presentations — to make complex topics accessible and engaging.
Support the coordination of the AI Community of Practice, connecting practitioners and sharing best practices.
Collaborate with AI development teams to understand their products, frameworks, and architectures, and translate them into meaningful internal communications.
Contribute to the organization of AI trainings, workshops, and internal events to promote learning and adoption.
Explore AI tools (LLMs, copilots, automation scripts) to improve internal processes and community engagement.


What We’re Looking For


Strong technical curiosity and foundational knowledge of AI and Machine Learning (LLMs, NLP, vector search, or data science basics).
Basic experience with Python and common AI tools or libraries (e.g., OpenAI API, Azure AI, LangChain, Hugging Face) — academic or self-taught.
Ability to digest and explain complex AI concepts clearly to non-technical audiences.
Creative mindset with attention to structure, storytelling, and impact in your communication.
Proactive and collaborative attitude, comfortable engaging with technical experts and business stakeholders alike.
Solid skills in PowerPoint, Excel, and collaboration tools (Teams, SharePoint, Miro).
Fluent in English (spoken and written); additional languages are a plus.


Why Join Us


Work directly with AI strategists and developers shaping the future of AI at Allianz Technology.
Gain hands-on exposure to real AI products and GenAI frameworks used across the company.
Develop both technical and strategic skills in one of the world’s leading technology organizations.
Join a passionate, international environment where your ideas and curiosity truly matter.


About Allianz Technology

With its headquarters in Munich, Germany, Allianz Technology is Allianz's global IT service provider and delivers IT solutions that drive the group's digitalization. With more than 11,000 employees in over 20 countries around the world, Allianz Technology is tasked to run, optimize, transform, and innovate the infrastructure, applications, and services together with Allianz companies to co-create the best customer experience.

We service the entire spectrum of digitalization – from one of the industry's largest IT infrastructure projects that spans data centres, networks, and security, to application platforms ranging from workplace services to digital interaction.

In short: We deliver comprehensive end-to-end IT solutions for Allianz in the digital age. We are the backbone of Allianz.

Find us at: www.linkedin.com/company/allianz-technology.

Commitment to Integrity, Fairness & Inclusion

Allianz Group is one of the most trusted insurance and asset management companies in the world. Caring for our employees, their ambitions, dreams and challenges, is what makes us a unique employer. Together we can build an environment where everyone feels empowered and has the confidence to explore, to grow and to shape a better future for our customers and the world around us.

We at Allianz believe in a strong inclusive culture that encourages people to speak their minds, get involved and question the status quo. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and encourage you to bring your whole self to work, no matter where you are from, what you look like, who you love, or what you believe in. We therefore welcome applications regardless of race, ethnicity or cultural background, age, gender, nationality, religion, social class, disability, sexual orientation, or any other characteristics protected under applicable local laws and regulations.

To Recruitment Agencies

Allianz Technology has an in-house recruitment team that sources great candidates directly. Therefore, Allianz Technology does not accept unsolicited resumes from agencies or search firm recruiters.

When we do work with recruitment agencies, that engagement is formalized by a contract. Fees will only be paid when there is a contract in place. Without a contract in place, we will not accept invoices on unsolicited resumes, even if the candidate was ultimately employed by Allianz.

Title: Administrativo/a| Clientes TOP | Empresa líder | Teletrabajo
Description:
¿Quieres formar parte de una organización que acompaña a las empresas en su camino hacia la excelencia?

¿Te motiva contribuir a la mejora continua del tejido empresarial, ofreciendo una atención cercana, ágil y de calidad?

En AENOR buscamos un/a Administrativo/a que quiera crecer en un entorno colaborativo, dinámico y con impacto. Serás el punto de referencia para nuestros clientes, acompañándolos en su recorrido con AENOR y asegurando que cada interacción aporte valor.

¿Cómo será tu experiencia como Administrativo/a en AENOR?

👥 Relaciones que generan impacto desde el primer día

Estarás en contacto directo con clientes, comprendiendo sus necesidades, resolviendo sus consultas y asegurando una atención cercana, ágil y empática.

🧭 Autonomía con respaldo experto

Gestionarás tu cartera de clientes con autonomía, contando con el apoyo del equipo técnico y comercial para ofrecer soluciones adaptadas y de calidad.

📊 Herramientas que potencian tu gestión

Utilizarás CRM y herramientas ofimáticas avanzadas (Excel, Access, Power BI) para dar seguimiento a clientes, analizar datos y mejorar procesos.

📈 Impacto real en la experiencia del cliente

Tu labor será clave en la fidelización, renovación y satisfacción de los clientes, contribuyendo directamente al crecimiento sostenible de la organización.

🎓 Aprendizaje continuo en certificación y gestión

Adquirirás conocimientos sobre sistemas de gestión, procesos de certificación y normativa técnica que te permitirán evolucionar profesionalmente.

🎁 Beneficios que marcan la diferencia

Jornada intensiva en verano, formación continua, retribución flexible, ambiente colaborativo y oportunidades reales de desarrollo.

¿Qué te hará tener éxito en esta posición?

🎓 Proactividad

Capacidad para anticiparte a las necesidades del cliente, detectar oportunidades de mejora y tener presencia activa en canales digitales.

📌 Experiencia

Al menos 3 años en atención al cliente, gestión de cuentas o funciones administrativas similares.

🧠 Conocimientos técnicos

Dominio avanzado de herramientas ofimáticas. Se valorará experiencia en certificación de sistemas de gestión y elaboración de propuestas.

🌍 Idiomas

Se valorará conocimiento de Inglés.

💡 Competencias clave


Escucha activa y empatía
Capacidad de comunicación y resolución
Colaboración y compromiso
Orientación a resultados y mejora continua


Tu propósito como Administrativo/a

Serás el nexo entre AENOR y sus clientes, garantizando una experiencia excelente en cada etapa del proceso. Contribuirás a fortalecer relaciones de confianza y a impulsar el desarrollo del tejido empresarial.

¿Te unes a nuestro propósito?

Adquirirás conocimientos sobre sistemas de gestión, procesos de certificación y normativa técnica que te permitirán evolucionar profesionalmente.

🎁 Beneficios que marcan la diferencia

Jornada intensiva en verano, formación continua, retribución flexible, ambiente colaborativo y oportunidades reales de desarrollo.

¿Qué te hará tener éxito en esta posición?

🎓 Proactividad

Capacidad para anticiparte a las necesidades del cliente, detectar oportunidades de mejora y tener presencia activa en canales digitales.

📌 Experiencia

Al menos 3 años en atención al cliente, gestión de cuentas o funciones administrativas similares.

🧠 Conocimientos técnicos

Dominio avanzado de herramientas ofimáticas. Se valorará experiencia en certificación de sistemas de gestión y elaboración de propuestas.

🌍 Idiomas

Se valorará conocimiento de Inglés.

💡 Competencias clave

  • Escucha activa y empatía
  • Capacidad de comunicación y resolución
  • Colaboración y compromiso
  • Orientación a resultados y mejora continua

Tu propósito como Administrativo/a

Serás el nexo entre AENOR y sus clientes, garantizando una experiencia excelente en cada etapa del proceso. Contribuirás a fortalecer relaciones de confianza y a impulsar el desarrollo del tejido empresarial.

¿Te unes a nuestro propósito?

Title: Pricing Intelligence Analyst
Description:
About WebBeds

Launched in 2013, WebBeds is a global marketplace for the travel trade, providing powerful distribution solutions that make selling and buying travel products easier. It sources accommodation and destination services from travel suppliers, aggregates and merchandises that content in the WebBeds platform, then distributes it to its global network of travel trade buyers, who sell to the travelling public.

Hotels and other suppliers - global and regional hotel chains, independent hotels, apartments, resorts, attractions, transfer and sightseeing companies and more - can sell their products to a global network of online and offline travel buyers through robust solutions that provide greater inventory control to simplify distribution, and leverage WebBeds enhanced analytics to inform inventory optimisation choices – saving costs and increasing revenue.

Travel buyers - online travel agencies, retail travel agents, corporate travel managers, tour operators, wholesalers, tourism boards, super apps, DMC’s, group providers, airlines and more - can integrate the hundreds of thousands of hotels and ground services in the WebBeds marketplace through simple and seamless API connectivity, or they can search, shop and book online through one of WebBeds trade only booking sites.

WebBeds operates globally through four geographic regions – Europe, Asia Pacific, MEA (Middle East and Africa) and Americas - with over 1,900 travel professionals working in 120 cities across 50 countries worldwide.

Find out more about the WebBeds business at www.webbeds.com

WebBeds is a travel brand of the Web Travel Group (ASX: WEB).

How will you make an impact?

We are seeking a highly analytical and technically skilled Pricing Intelligence Analyst to support our Commercial Planning team. This role is instrumental in leveraging data from multiple sources to generate insights that inform pricing strategies and drive business decisions.

The ideal candidate will be comfortable working with large datasets, building clear and actionable reports, and programming in SQL and/or Python to automate and enhance analytical processes.

Key Responsibilities, But Not Limited To


Collect, clean, and analyze data from various internal and external sources to support pricing decisions.
Develop and maintain dashboards and reports that provide clear, actionable insights for stakeholders.
Identify trends, patterns, and anomalies in pricing and performance data to support strategic initiatives.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business needs and translate them into analytical solutions.
Support the development and refinement of pricing models and forecasting tools.
Automate data processes and reporting workflows using SQL and/or Python.
Present findings and recommendations in a clear and compelling manner to both technical and non-technical audiences


The skills we would love to see in your suitcase!

Experience


Previous experience in a similar role (e.g., pricing, revenue management, business intelligence, data analytics) is highly valued.
Experience working with large datasets and transforming data into business-relevant insights.
Exposure to pricing or commercial strategy environments is a plus.


Skills & Competencies


Strong analytical mindset with attention to detail and problem-solving capabilities.
Proficiency in SQL and/or Python for data manipulation, automation, and analysis.
Ability to build and maintain dashboards and reports using visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Looker).
Comfortable working with multiple data sources and managing data quality.
Strong communication skills, with the ability to present complex findings in a clear and concise manner to both technical and non-technical audiences.
Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.
Collaborative mindset and willingness to support cross-functional teams


Languages


Fluent English is mandatory, both written and spoken.
Strong command of Spanish is highly recommended.


Why choose us as your next destination?

We are super proud of our dedicated team of friendly, energetic & passionate professionals. Our people are key to the success of our business & everybody at WebBeds has their own unique role to play as we continue to drive the company forward.

Over 50 different languages are spoken by our workforce, but whether working from offices in Dubai or London or out in the field in Johannesburg or Buenos Aires, we all share the common goal to take pride in what we do & to deliver our partners with unbeatable service & support.


International highly skilled group of experts from all around the globe 🌎
Dynamic environment with the chance to grow, influence & impact change ⚡
Disruptive, fast-growing market leader within travel & endless possibilities 💼
Culture built on collaboration🤝 empowerment and innovation 💡


Click for more information about life at WebBeds : https://vimeo.com/448790131

Find out more about the WebBeds business at www.webbeds.com

Title: Revenue Data Analyst
Place: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Canary Islands, Spain
Description:
Sobre RIU Hotels & Resorts




Con más de 100 hoteles en 23 países y 70 años de excelencia en el sector hotelero, RIU Hotels & Resorts es un líder mundial reconocido por su servicio excepcional, innovación y hospitalidad.




Únete a nosotros mientras seguimos redefiniendo el lujo y la excelencia. Ya sea desarrollando tu carrera profesional, explorando nuevos horizontes o trabajando con un equipo dinámico e inclusivo, RIU Hotels & Resorts te ofrece oportunidades inigualables para continuar creciendo.




Revenue Data Analyst




Misión del Puesto

El candidato/a seleccionado/a se integrará en la estructura analítica del Área Comercial, teniendo como responsabilidad principal la transformación de grandes volúmenes de datos en inteligencia competitiva ejecutable. Su función será modelar escenarios de demanda, auditar la elasticidad de precios y optimizar la toma de decisiones estratégicas.




Responsabilidades Clave y Funciones




Auditoría y Modelado de Demanda.
Análisis Estratégico de KPIs.
Gestión de datos: Uploading, acción, extracción, depuración, normalización y mantenimiento de datos comerciales, garantizando la integridad de los mismos.
Visualización y Business Intelligence: Diseñar, automatizar y mantener cuadros de mando interactivos que traduzcan métricas complejas en reportes visuales.




Perfil Requerido




Formación Académica

Titulación universitaria superior en Administración y Dirección de Empresas (ADE), Economía, Matemáticas, Estadística o Ingeniería de datos.
Valoración preferencial: Postgrado o Máster en Data Science, Business Analytics, Inteligencia Artificial o Revenue Management.




Competencias Técnicas y Herramientas

Dominio avanzado de hojas de cálculo (análisis estadístico y modelado financiero).
Conocimientos de entornos de Business Intelligence y ecosistemas Google enfocado a datos.

Conocimientos de automatización de procesos rutinarios de datos.




Requisitos Lingüísticos

España : Español e Inglés nivel alto.
Marruecos: Árabe y Francés nativos/bilingües + inglés medio. Se valorarán positivamente los conocimientos de Español.




Valorable

Competencia técnica o nociones operativas en lenguajes de programación orientados a datos (Python, SQL).
Experiencia previa (prácticas o posición junior) en departamentos analíticos del sector hospitality o distribución turística.




Qué ofrecemos




Desarrollo Transversal: Incorporación a una de las cadenas hoteleras vacacionales líderes a nivel global, interactuando directamente con equipos multidisciplinares de Revenue, Ventas y Distribución.
Cultura Basada en Datos: Un entorno profesional donde el análisis predictivo y el pensamiento crítico tienen un impacto directo y medible en la estrategia corporativa.
